zh.Elderslie, Renfrewshire, Scotland: 蘇格蘭雷福福爾艾爾德斯利
zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret de Crawford於1251年出生在英國蘇格蘭艾斯爾時，她的父親Hugh Crawford 5th Laird of Loudoun31歲，母親Alicia de Dalsallock21歲。她於1268年與Sir Malcolm “Alan” Wallace Ist Laird of Elderslie在蘇格蘭艾斯爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。她去世於1291年9月之後在蘇格蘭艾斯爾盧度，埋葬在蘇格蘭艾斯爾盧度。

zh-hans.Elderslie, Renfrewshire, Scotland: 苏格兰雷福福爾艾爾德斯利
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret de Crawford于1251年出生在英国苏格兰艾斯爾时，她的父亲Hugh Crawford 5th Laird of Loudoun31岁，母亲Alicia de Dalsallock21岁。她于1268年与Sir Malcolm “Alan” Wallace Ist Laird of Elderslie在苏格兰艾斯爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。她去世于1291年9月之后在苏格兰艾斯爾盧度，埋葬在苏格兰艾斯爾盧度。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Crawford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish and English: habitational name from any of various places called Crawford, primarily the one in Lanarkshire (Scotland), and possibly also from the one in Lancashire. Both are named in Old English with crāwe ‘crow’ + ford ‘ford’.

variants.name: Crafford
meanings: English (Cumberland) and Scottish: variant of   Crawford  .

variants.name: Crofoot
meanings: English: variant ofCrowfoot, a nickname for someone with splayed feet or someother deformity of the foot, from Old English crāwe ‘crow’ +fōt ‘foot’. In Middle English crou-fot also denotedthe buttercup, and it may be from this sense that the name arose,although the reason for its adoption is unclear.

variants.name: Crofut
meanings: Scottish and English: variant of Crawford or Crowfoot (see Crofoot ).

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret de Crawford was born in 1251, in Ayrshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, Hugh Crawford 5th Laird of Loudoun, was 31 and her mother, Alicia de Dalsallock, was 21. She married Sir Malcolm “Alan” Wallace Ist Laird of Elderslie in 1268, in Ayrshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. She died after September 1291, in Loudoun, Ayrshire, Scotland, and was buried in Loudoun, Ayrshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret de Crawford est née en 1251, à Ayrshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Hugh Crawford 5th Laird of Loudoun, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Alicia de Dalsallock, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Malcolm “Alan” Wallace Ist Laird of Elderslie en 1268, à Ayrshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Elle est décédée après septembre 1291, à Loudoun, Ayrshire, Écosse, et a été enterrée à Loudoun, Ayrshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret de Crawford 1251 in Ayrshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Hugh Crawford 5th Laird of Loudoun 31 und ihre Mutter Alicia de Dalsallock 21. Sie hat 1268 in Ayrshire, Scotland Sir Malcolm “Alan” Wallace Ist Laird of Elderslie geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Sie starb nach September 1291 in Loudoun, Ayrshire, Scotland und wurde in Loudoun, Ayrshire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret de Crawford è nata il nel 1251 nel Ayrshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, sua padre, Hugh Crawford 5th Laird of Loudoun, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Alicia de Dalsallock, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato Sir Malcolm “Alan” Wallace Ist Laird of Elderslie nel 1268, nel Ayrshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì dopo il settembre 1291, nel Loudoun, Ayrshire, Scotland, e fu sepolta a Loudoun, Ayrshire, Scotland.

ja.Loudoun, Ayrshire, Scotland: スコットランドエイルシュアイアロウドウン
ja.Elderslie, Renfrewshire, Scotland: スコットランドレンフリューシュアイアエルダースリー
ja.Ayrshire, Scotland: スコットランドエイルシュアイア
ja.lifeSummary: Margaret de Crawfordが1251年にイギリススコットランドエイルシュアイアで生まれた時，父Hugh Crawford 5th Laird of Loudounは31歳，母Alicia de Dalsallockは21歳であった。1268年にスコットランドエイルシュアイアでSir Malcolm “Alan” Wallace Ist Laird of Elderslieと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼女は1291年9月以後にスコットランドエイルシュアイアロウドウンで死去し，スコットランドエイルシュアイアロウドウンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret de Crawford(이)가 1251년 영국 스코틀랜드 에이르실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hugh Crawford 5th Laird of Loudoun(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alicia de Dalsallock(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 1268년 스컷랜드 에이르실르에서 Sir Malcolm “Alan” Wallace Ist Laird of Elderslie(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1291년 9월 이후 스컷랜드 에이르실르 루다운에서 사망했으며 스컷랜드 에이르실르 루다운에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret de Crawford nasceu em 1251, em Ayrshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Hugh Crawford 5th Laird of Loudoun, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Alicia de Dalsallock, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Malcolm “Alan” Wallace Ist Laird of Elderslie em 1268, em Ayrshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ela faleceu após setembro de 1291, em Loudoun, Ayrshire, Scotland, e foi sepultada em Loudoun, Ayrshire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret de Crawford родилась в 1251 г. в местности аиршир, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Hugh Crawford 5th Laird of Loudoun было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Alicia de Dalsallock, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Malcolm “Alan” Wallace Ist Laird of Elderslie в 1268 г. в местности аиршир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Она умерла после сентябрь 1291 г. в местности лоудоун, аиршир, Шотландия и была похоронена в местности лоудоун, аиршир, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret de Crawford nació en 1251, en Ayrshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Hugh Crawford 5th Laird of Loudoun, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Alicia de Dalsallock, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Sir Malcolm “Alan” Wallace Ist Laird of Elderslie en 1268, en Ayrshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió después de septiembre de 1291, en Loudoun, Ayrshire, Scotland, y fue sepultada en Loudoun, Ayrshire, Scotland.
